summary: Atlassian.net exposes a required-auth Atlassian GraphQL API (OAuth 2.0 bearer on `https://api.atlassian.com/graphql` or browser-session/API-token basic auth on tenant gateways), Jira Cloud REST API v3 and Confluence Cloud REST API v2 (Atlassian API token basic auth or Atlassian OAuth 2.0), Bitbucket Cloud REST API (Bitbucket access token bearer or app password basic auth), and a Forge CLI login flow via `forge login` for Forge tooling.
